tools.Name: Deep-Live-Cam
tools.Description: Real-time face swapping and video deepfake generation using a single image.
tools.Use_Case: Creating viral memes, performance art, and AI-generated media content.

tools.Name: MarkItDown
tools.Description: A lightweight Python utility for converting various file types (PDF, Office docs, Images, Audio, etc.) to Markdown.
tools.Use_Case: Preparing diverse data sources for use with LLMs and text analysis pipelines.

tools.Name: Axolotl
tools.Description: A free and open-source framework designed to streamline fine-tuning for Large Language Models (LLMs).
tools.Use_Case: Fine-tuning and post-training LLMs with support for various methods like LoRA, QLoRA, DPO, and multimodal training.
